texto: For the first time in years Ashley found herself feeling truly alone. Despite being surrounded by people most of every day, she was unable to connect to them in a way she considered meaningful, and found herself passing through their lives - and her own - in a state of total isolation.
explicacao: Citação de Alex Ross Perry sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “For the first time in years Ashley found herself feeling truly alone.
